_schema.timestamp: YYYY-MM-DD (exact) or YYYY-MM (month-level when the day is uncertain)
_schema.kind: episode | session | milestone | announcement | bounty | cast | upcoming
_schema.title: short headline
_schema.raw_ref: path to a captured raw file under data/streams/<id>/raw/ (optional - present once pulled)

_note: Merged chronological feed across all streams. Curated seed entries below; scripts/pull-data-streams.mjs appends pulled entries (e.g. BCZ YapZ episodes) and dedupes by stream + timestamp + title. Sorted newest first.

entries.title: The build IS the application
entries.summary: ZABAL Gamez is The ZAO 3-month Build-A-Thon - a build event for the ecosystem, not a video-game contest. June workshops, July open build, August Finals. Free, any harness.

entries.title: Every finisher gets paid
entries.summary: $500 USDC pool from the ZAO festivals team, tiered across finishers, plus a Hats Protocol role NFT for everyone who ships. The cash is the floor - finishers keep the repo and the 1% WaveWarZ trade cut that flows after the Finals.

entries.title: Build for a real community
entries.summary: You build on live ZAO rails (Empire Builder, Hats, Bonfire, EAS, Farcaster) for a 100+ member community that needs the tools - not a throwaway demo, with a ZAO mentor as your teammate.

entries.title: Proven crew, proven execution
entries.summary: The ZAO has run weekly Respect sessions for 90+ weeks straight since August 2024. Zaal/Zlank won the Snap category at FarHack 2026.

entries.title: Farcaster Batches expected on GM Farcaster X spaces
entries.summary: Farcaster Batches is expected to be introduced on GM Farcaster during its X spaces. Exact date pending - watch the GM Farcaster channel. Marked upcoming, not yet shipped.

entries.title: Season 1 begins - workshop month opens
entries.summary: Insert Coin. June is workshop month - ZAO builders record ~30-min sessions on the tools they have built, landing in the Magnetiq portal.

entries.title: BCZ YapZ wired as a Zabal Data Stream
entries.summary: BCZ YapZ registered as a data stream. Episode transcripts and content/bonfire-ingest files pull from the bcz-yapz repo into the timeline and the ZABAL Bonfire.

entries.title: Prize pool locked - $500 USDC v0
entries.summary: The ZAO festivals team funds the Season 1 prize pool: $500 USDC for v0, tiered across finalists, plus a Hats Protocol role NFT for every finisher. Sponsor inquiries: info@thezao.com.

entries.title: Workshop lead #002 confirmed - Thy Revolution (2 sessions)
entries.summary: Thy Revolution (Mickey / Rev) confirmed 2 June workshop sessions. Slate now 3 confirmed sessions (Tyler #001 + Thy Revolution #002a + #002b).

entries.title: FarHack 2026 - Zaal/Zlank win the Snap category ($1,000)
entries.summary: Coming out of the bootcamp, Zaal/Zlank won the Snap category at FarHack 2026 - a $1,000 prize that went to ZAOstock. Month-level date; exact day pending confirmation.

entries.title: Farcaster Agentic Bootcamp ends
entries.summary: Two-week program wraps. Builds deployed live, ready to compete in FarHack Online 2026.

entries.title: Farcaster Agentic Bootcamp begins
entries.summary: Builders Garden + Dev3Pack open a two-week online program: zero to autonomous agents and miniapps on the Farcaster social graph.
